# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notification Workflow

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, edited]
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'release/**'

env:
  PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
  PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
  PR_BRANCH: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
  PR_BASE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}

jobs:
  extract-pr-metadata:
    name: Extract PR Metadata
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      pr_title: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}
      pr_description: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_description }}
      pr_number: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}
      pr_author: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_author }}
      pr_labels: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_labels }}
      pr_milestone: ${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_milestone }}
      change_type: ${{ steps.categorize.outputs.change_type }}
      release_note_entry: ${{ steps.release-note.outputs.entry }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Extract PR Information
        id: pr-info
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const pr = context.payload.pull_request;
            const title = pr.title || '';
            const description = pr.body || 'No description provided';
            const number = pr.number;
            const author = pr.user.login;
            const labels = pr.labels.map(l => l.name).join(',');
            const milestone = pr.milestone ? pr.milestone.title : 'none';

            // Sanitize for use in outputs
            const sanitizedTitle = title.replace(/[`$"\\]/g, '');
            const sanitizedDesc = description.replace(/[`$"\\]/g, '').substring(0, 1000);

            core.setOutput('pr_title', sanitizedTitle);
            core.setOutput('pr_description', sanitizedDesc);
            core.setOutput('pr_number', number.toString());
            core.setOutput('pr_author', author);
            core.setOutput('pr_labels', labels);
            core.setOutput('pr_milestone', milestone);

            core.info(`PR #${number}: ${sanitizedTitle}`);
            core.info(`Author: ${author}`);
            core.info(`Labels: ${labels}`);
            core.info(`Milestone: ${milestone}`);

      - name: Categorize Change Type
        id: categorize
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const title = `${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}`.toLowerCase();
            const labels = `${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_labels }}`.toLowerCase();

            let changeType = 'other';

            if (title.startsWith('feat') || labels.includes('feature') || labels.includes('enhancement')) {
              changeType = 'feature';
            } else if (title.startsWith('fix') || labels.includes('bug') || labels.includes('bugfix')) {
              changeType = 'bugfix';
            } else if (title.startsWith('docs') || labels.includes('documentation')) {
              changeType = 'docs';
            } else if (title.startsWith('chore') || labels.includes('chore') || labels.includes('maintenance')) {
              changeType = 'chore';
            } else if (title.startsWith('refactor') || labels.includes('refactor')) {
              changeType = 'refactor';
            } else if (title.startsWith('perf') || labels.includes('performance')) {
              changeType = 'performance';
            } else if (title.startsWith('test') || labels.includes('test')) {
              changeType = 'test';
            } else if (title.startsWith('ci') || labels.includes('ci')) {
              changeType = 'ci';
            } else if (title.includes('breaking') || labels.includes('breaking-change')) {
              changeType = 'breaking';
            }

            core.setOutput('change_type', changeType);
            core.info(`Change type: ${changeType}`);

      - name: Generate Release Note Entry
        id: release-note
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const title = `${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_title }}`;
            const number = `${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_number }}`;
            const author = `${{ steps.pr-info.outputs.pr_author }}`;
            const changeType = `${{ steps.categorize.outputs.change_type }}`;

            const typeEmoji = {
              feature: '✨',
              bugfix: '🐛',
              docs: '📚',
              chore: '🔧',
              refactor: '♻️',
              performance: '⚡',
              test: '🧪',
              ci: '👷',
              breaking: '💥',
              other: '📝'
            };

            const emoji = typeEmoji[changeType] || '📝';
            const entry = `${emoji} ${title} (#${number}) @${author}`;

            core.setOutput('entry', entry);
            core.info(`Release note entry: ${entry}`);

  build:
    name: Build and Test
    needs: extract-pr-metadata
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      build_status: ${{ steps.build-result.outputs.status }}
      build_duration: ${{ steps.build-result.outputs.duration }}
      test_results: ${{ steps.test-result.outputs.summary }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Display Build Context
        run: |
          echo "========================================="
          echo "Building PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}"
          echo "Title: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"
          echo "Author: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}"
          echo "Change Type: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}"
          echo "Release Note: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_note_entry }}"
          echo "========================================="

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci || echo "No package-lock.json found, skipping npm ci"

      - name: Run Build
        id: build-step
        run: |
          BUILD_START=$(date +%s)
          echo "build_start=$BUILD_START" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          # Run build with PR context in environment
          export BUILD_PR_TITLE="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"
          export BUILD_PR_NUMBER="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}"

          npm run build 2>&1 || echo "No build script found, skipping"

          BUILD_END=$(date +%s)
          echo "build_end=$BUILD_END" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Run Tests
        id: test-step
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          npm test 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt || echo "No test script found or tests failed"
          echo "exit_code=$?" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Parse Test Results
        id: test-result
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ -f test-output.txt ]; then
            SUMMARY=$(tail -20 test-output.txt | head -10)
          else
            SUMMARY="No test output available"
          fi
          # Use delimiter for multiline output
          echo "summary<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$SUMMARY" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Determine Build Result
        id: build-result
        if: always()
        run: |
          BUILD_START=${{ steps.build-step.outputs.build_start || '0' }}
          BUILD_END=${{ steps.build-step.outputs.build_end || '0' }}
          if [ "$BUILD_START" != "0" ] && [ "$BUILD_END" != "0" ]; then
            DURATION=$((BUILD_END - BUILD_START))
          else
            DURATION=0
          fi
          echo "duration=${DURATION}s" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          if [ "${{ steps.test-step.outcome }}" == "failure" ]; then
            echo "status=failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

  generate-release-notes:
    name: Generate Release Notes Artifact
    needs: [extract-pr-metadata, build]
    if: always()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Create Release Note Entry
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-notes

          cat > release-notes/pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}.md << 'RELEASE_EOF'
          ## PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}

          **Author:** @${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}
          **Type:** ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}
          **Branch:** ${{ env.PR_BRANCH }} → ${{ env.PR_BASE }}
          **Build Status:** ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status || 'unknown' }}
          **Build Duration:** ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration || 'N/A' }}
          **Labels:** ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_labels || 'none' }}
          **Milestone:** ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_milestone }}

          ### Description
          ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_description }}

          ### Changelog Entry
          ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_note_entry }}

          ---
          *Generated at $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") by PR Build Workflow*
          RELEASE_EOF

          echo "Release note generated:"
          cat release-notes/pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}.md

      - name: Upload Release Note Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-note-pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}
          path: release-notes/
          retention-days: 90

  notify:
    name: Send Build Notifications
    needs: [extract-pr-metadata, build]
    if: always()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Determine Notification Status
        id: status
        run: |
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status || 'unknown' }}"
          if [ "$BUILD_STATUS" == "success" ]; then
            echo "emoji=✅" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=#36a64f" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "status_text=succeeded" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [ "$BUILD_STATUS" == "failed" ]; then
            echo "emoji=❌" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=#dc3545" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "status_text=failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "emoji=⚠️" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=#ffc107" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "status_text=unknown" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Post PR Comment with Build Results
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const prNumber = parseInt('${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}');
            const prTitle = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}`;
            const changeType = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}`;
            const buildStatus = `${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status || 'unknown' }}`;
            const buildDuration = `${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration || 'N/A' }}`;
            const releaseEntry = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_note_entry }}`;
            const statusEmoji = `${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}`;
            const statusText = `${{ steps.status.outputs.status_text }}`;
            const runUrl = `${context.serverUrl}/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}`;

            const commentBody = `## ${statusEmoji} Build ${statusText}

            | Property | Value |
            |----------|-------|
            | **PR Title** | ${prTitle} |
            | **Change Type** | \`${changeType}\` |
            | **Build Status** | ${statusEmoji} ${statusText} |
            | **Build Duration** | ${buildDuration} |
            | **Workflow Run** | [View Details](${runUrl}) |

            ### 📋 Release Note Entry
            > ${releaseEntry}

            ### 🔄 Deployment Tracking
            This PR will be tracked with the following commit message format when merged:
            \`\`\`
            ${prTitle} (#${prNumber})
            \`\`\`

            ---
            <sub>🤖 Automated by PR Build & Notification Workflow</sub>`;

            // Find and update existing comment or create new one
            const marker = '<!-- pr-build-notification -->';
            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: prNumber,
            });

            const existingComment = comments.find(c => c.body.includes(marker));

            const fullBody = `${marker}\n${commentBody}`;

            if (existingComment) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                comment_id: existingComment.id,
                body: fullBody,
              });
              core.info(`Updated existing comment ${existingComment.id}`);
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: prNumber,
                body: fullBody,
              });
              core.info('Created new build notification comment');
            }

      - name: Send Slack Notification
        if: env.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          PR_TITLE="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"
          PR_NUMBER="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}"
          PR_AUTHOR="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}"
          CHANGE_TYPE="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}"
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status || 'unknown' }}"
          BUILD_DURATION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration || 'N/A' }}"
          RELEASE_ENTRY="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_note_entry }}"
          STATUS_EMOJI="${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}"
          COLOR="${{ steps.status.outputs.color }}"
          RUN_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          PR_URL="${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}"

          PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
          {
            "attachments": [
              {
                "color": "${COLOR}",
                "blocks": [
                  {
                    "type": "header",
                    "text": {
                      "type": "plain_text",
                      "text": "${STATUS_EMOJI} PR Build: ${PR_TITLE} (#${PR_NUMBER})"
                    }
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "section",
                    "fields": [
                      {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*Author:*\n@${PR_AUTHOR}"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*Change Type:*\n${CHANGE_TYPE}"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*Build Status:*\n${BUILD_STATUS}"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "mrkdwn",
                        "text": "*Duration:*\n${BUILD_DURATION}"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "section",
                    "text": {
                      "type": "mrkdwn",
                      "text": "*Release Note:*\n${RELEASE_ENTRY}"
                    }
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "actions",
                    "elements": [
                      {
                        "type": "button",
                        "text": {
                          "type": "plain_text",
                          "text": "View PR"
                        },
                        "url": "${PR_URL}"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "button",
                        "text": {
                          "type": "plain_text",
                          "text": "View Build"
                        },
                        "url": "${RUN_URL}"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
          EOF
          )

          curl -s -X POST \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            --data "${PAYLOAD}" \
            "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}"

          echo "Slack notification sent"

      - name: Send Microsoft Teams Notification
        if: env.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          PR_TITLE="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"
          PR_NUMBER="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}"
          PR_AUTHOR="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}"
          CHANGE_TYPE="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}"
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status || 'unknown' }}"
          BUILD_DURATION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration || 'N/A' }}"
          RELEASE_ENTRY="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_note_entry }}"
          STATUS_EMOJI="${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}"
          COLOR="${{ steps.status.outputs.color }}"
          RUN_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          PR_URL="${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}"

          PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
          {
            "@type": "MessageCard",
            "@context": "http://schema.org/extensions",
            "themeColor": "${COLOR}",
            "summary": "${STATUS_EMOJI} PR #${PR_NUMBER}: ${PR_TITLE}",
            "sections": [
              {
                "activityTitle": "${STATUS_EMOJI} PR Build: ${PR_TITLE} (#${PR_NUMBER})",
                "facts": [
                  { "name": "Author", "value": "@${PR_AUTHOR}" },
                  { "name": "Change Type", "value": "${CHANGE_TYPE}" },
                  { "name": "Build Status", "value": "${BUILD_STATUS}" },
                  { "name": "Duration", "value": "${BUILD_DURATION}" },
                  { "name": "Release Note", "value": "${RELEASE_ENTRY}" }
                ],
                "markdown": true
              }
            ],
            "potentialAction": [
              {
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                "name": "View Pull Request",
                "targets": [{ "os": "default", "uri": "${PR_URL}" }]
              },
              {
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                "name": "View Build",
                "targets": [{ "os": "default", "uri": "${RUN_URL}" }]
              }
            ]
          }
          EOF
          )

          curl -s -X POST \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            --data "${PAYLOAD}" \
            "${TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL}"

          echo "Teams notification sent"

      - name: Create Deployment Tracking Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## 🚀 Deployment Tracking Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Field | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|-------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **PR** | #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Title** | ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Author** | @${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Change Type** | \`${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.change_type }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Build Status** | ${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }} ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status || 'unknown' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Build Duration** | ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration || 'N/A' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Labels** | ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_labels || 'none' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Milestone** | ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_milestone }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### 📋 Release Note Entry" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "> ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_note_entry }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### 🔀 Merge Commit Format" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "\`\`\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }} (#${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }})" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "\`\`\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### 📝 PR Description" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_description }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
